title: Material Weapons
description: This Data Pack Gives Few More Weapons For Minecraft!
body:
**WARNING!**
**Put this datapack in resourcepack folder too!**

This Datapack Gives You Few More Weapons With Custom Skills To Your Minecraft Arsenal!

If You Want To Minecraft Combat Again This Is The Datapack For You!                                                                                         
It Can Enchance Your Game A Lot!

This Datapack Features Few Weapons With Custom Abilities:                                                                                                                           
(All Abilities Have Range Of 20 Blocks And They Are Accessible Through Crouching)

- Darkness Scythe - Make Your Enemies Struggle With Darkness!

- Ender Axe - Make The Dragon Breath To Fall On Your Enemies!

- Fire Sword - Fire Will Burn Your Enemies!

- Ice Hammer - Freeze Your Enemies!

- Lightning Sword - Hit Your Enemies With Lightning Bolt!

- Poison Sickle - Give Poison Effect To Your Enemies!

--Recipes--
